Ace was over for dinner again, just like every night. A family dinner with his best friend and his best friend's little sibling. Tonight though, he's being bold. Bolder than he has. What started as simple touches turns into a grope fest.

Shouldn't be any trigger warnings/content warnings, besides mans getting gropey in front of the fam under the table. Once I post him, I CANNOT control him. If he does DEAD DOVE things, that is not my fault lol that is the LLM. I have no control over your chats. Okay, thank youuu! 🫶🏻
